Exercise 9.Write down the article where necessary.
1 . 1 can see many ... people in ... street.
2. Can you see ... car?
3. She is ... manager. She is a t ... work. She works a t... office.
4. Do you see these ... flowers? What colour are ... flowers?
5. There is ... big brown table in ... middle of our ... room.
6. There are two kittens in ... box. ... kittens are black.
7. Do you see ... boy in ... street? He is ... pupil of our ... school. He is ... good pupil.
8. My sister is ... student. She studies a t ... institute. She is ... good student and ... good sister.
9. This is ... wolf. ... wolf is very hungry.
10. There is ... carpet on ... floor. ... carpet is new.

1. One can see many people in the street.
2. Can you see a car?
3. She is a manager. She is at work. She works at an office.
4. Do you see these flowers? What color are the flowers?
5. There is a big brown table in the middle of our room.
6. There are two kittens in a box. The kittens are black.
7. Do you see a boy in the street? He is a pupil of our school. He is a good pupil.
8. My sister is a student. She studies at an institute. She is a good student and a good sister.
9. This is a wolf. The wolf is very hungry.
10. There is a carpet on the floor. The carpet is new.

Exercise 11.Write down the article where necessary.
1. There is ... cup on ... table. Give me ... cup, please.
2. What is your ... child doing? — She is playing with ..  ball. ... ball is red.
3. There were many children in ... park yesterday.
4. My sister is ... pupil. She goes to ... school.
5. When does your ... sister leave,... home for ... school?
6. There are many ... schools and ... institutes in my ... city.
7. This ... boy is ... fifth son in his ... family.
8. Monday is ... second day of ... week.
9. You have ... book on ... table. Is this ... book interesting?
10. There are many articles in magazine.

1. There is a cup on the table. Give me the cup, please.
2. What is your child doing? — She is playing with a ball. The ball is red.
3. There were many children in the park yesterday.
4. My sister is a pupil. She goes to school.
5. When does your sister leave home for school?
6. There are many schools and institutes in my city.
7. This boy is the fifth son in his family.
8. Monday is the second day of the week.
9. You have a book on the table. Is this book interesting?
10. There are many articles in the magazine.

Exercise 12.Write down the article where necessary. 
This is ... picture of my room. There is ... large window in my ... room. ... ceiling is white, ... floor is brown, ... walls are blue.
There is ... writing-table near ... window and ... chair near it. You can see ... telephone on ... writing-table.
I often speak on ... telephone. There is ... bookcase to ... right of... writing-table. There are not many books in ... bookcase, but there are ... lot of ... magazines in it. I usually spend ... lot of time in my ... room.

This is a picture of my room. There is a large window in my room. The ceiling is white, the floor is brown, the walls are blue.
There is a writing-table near the window and a chair near it. You can see a telephone on the writing-table.
I often speak on the telephone. There is a bookcase to the right of the writing-table. There are not many books in the bookcase, but there are a lot of magazines in it. I usually spend a lot of time in my room.

Exercise 13.Write down the article where necessary.
1. Are there many ... magazines on ... table?
2. There are two Windows in ... room.
3. His daughter is ... girl of ten.
4. Their sons go to ... school every day.
5. Her parents live in ... Kyiv.
6. My father often rests on ... Sunday.
7. Our flat is on ... third floor.
8. Today is ... ninth of September.
9. Pete, go to ... blackboard.
10. Oh ... Monday he comes from ... school a t ... 5 o’clock.

1. Are there many magazines on the table?
2. There are two windows in the room.
3. His daughter is a girl of ten.
4. Their sons go to school every day.
5. Her parents live in Kyiv.
6. My father often rests on Sunday.
7. Our flat is on the third floor.
8. Today is the ninth of September.
9. Pete, go to the blackboard.
10. Oh, on Monday he comes from school at 5 o'clock.

Exercise 14.Write down the article where necessary.
1. ... second lesson today is English.
2. What is ... day today? — Today is ... Friday.
3 .1 will not go to ... work on ... Tuesday.
4. Lesson of English is ... last.
5. Му son does not sleep a t ... daytime. He sleeps a t ... night.
6. September is ... ninth month of year.
7. The man is standing near ... door.
8. We have dictations twice ... week.
9. She is quite ... child.
10. My grandfather was ... very good man.

1. The second lesson today is English.
2. What is the day today? — Today is Friday.
3. I will not go to work on Tuesday.
4. The lesson of English is the last.
5. My son does not sleep at daytime. He sleeps at night.
6. September is the ninth month of the year.
7. The man is standing near the door.
8. We have dictations twice a week.
9. She is quite a child.
10. My grandfather was a very good man.

Exercise 15.Write down the article where necessary.
Му sister lives in ... Kharkiv. She is ... doctor. She works at ... hospital. ... hospital is ... new and ... modern building.
... hospital is near my sister’s ... house. My sister has got ... family. She has got ... husband and ... son.
Her husband is ... teacher. He works at ... school. My sister’s son is ... pupil. He is ... pupil of ... second form.
He goes to ... school every day but ... Sunday.

My sister lives in Kharkiv. She is a doctor. She works at a hospital. The hospital is a new and modern building.
The hospital is near my sister's house. My sister has got a family. She has got a husband and a son.
Her husband is a teacher. He works at a school. My sister's son is a pupil. He is a pupil of the second form.
He goes to school every day but Sunday.

Exercise 16.Write down the article where necessary.
1. After ... work I usually go home.
2. He often comes from ... work late.
3. I begin my work at ... half past eight.
4. Close ... window, please. It is cold in ... room.
5. We have tests three times ... month.
6. He made ... mistake in his dictation.
7. ... lion is ... wild animal.
8. I need ... pencil. Give me ... pencil, please.
9. Yesterday our team won ... match.
10. He is not ... man I am looking for.

1. After work I usually go home.
2. He often comes from work late.
3. I begin my work at half past eight.
4. Close the window, please. It is cold in the room.
5. We have tests three times a month.
6. He made a mistake in his dictation.
7. A lion is a wild animal.
8. I need a pencil. Give me a pencil, please.
9. Yesterday our team won the match.
10. He is not the man I am looking for.
Hello! How can I assist you today?
As an AI, I don't have feelings, but I'm here and ready to help you. How can I assist you today?
